channel.title: Vulncheck KEV
channel.description: Newly added vulnerabilities to the VulnCheck KEV database

item.title: [vulncheck] CVE-2023-52028 - TOTOlink A3700R setTracerouteCfg Vulnerability
item.description:
TOTOlink A3700R v9.1.2u.5822_B20200513 was discovered to contain a remote command execution (RCE) vulnerability via the setTracerouteCfg function.

Vendor: totolink
Product: a3700r_firmware

VulnCheck Reported Exploitation Citations:
  • https://dashboard.shadowserver.org/statistics/honeypot/vulnerability/map/?day=2024-08-07&host_type=src&vulnerability=cve-2023-52028

item.title: [vulncheck] CVE-2023-4450 - jeecg jimureport Improper Neutralization of Special Elements in Output Used by a Downstream Component ('Injection')
item.description:
A vulnerability was found in jeecgboot JimuReport up to 1.6.0. It has been declared as critical. Affected by this vulnerability is an unknown functionality of the component Template Handler. The manipulation leads to injection. The attack can be launched remotely. The exploit has been disclosed to the public and may be used. Upgrading to version 1.6.1 is able to address this issue. It is recommended to upgrade the affected component. The associated identifier of this vulnerability is VDB-237571.

Vendor: jeecg
Product: jimureport

VulnCheck Reported Exploitation Citations:
  • https://dashboard.shadowserver.org/statistics/honeypot/vulnerability/map/?day=2024-08-06&host_type=src&vulnerability=cve-2023-4450
VulnCheck XDB Entries:
  • https://vulncheck.com/xdb/ee5af2a9df25 - https://github.com/ilikeoyt/CVE-2023-4450-Attack

item.title: [vulncheck] CVE-2024-4885 - Progress WhatsUp Gold WhatsUp.ExportUtilities.Export.GetFileWithoutZip Vulnerablility
item.description:
In WhatsUp Gold versions released before 2023.1.3, an unauthenticated Remote Code Execution vulnerability in Progress WhatsUpGold. The WhatsUp.ExportUtilities.Export.GetFileWithoutZip allows execution of commands with iisapppool\mconsole privileges.

Vendor: Progress
Product: WhatsUp Gold

VulnCheck Reported Exploitation Citations:
  • https://dashboard.shadowserver.org/statistics/honeypot/vulnerability/map/?day=2024-08-06&host_type=src&vulnerability=cve-2024-4885
  • https://dashboard.shadowserver.org/statistics/honeypot/vulnerability/map/?day=2024-08-08&host_type=src&vulnerability=cve-2024-4885
  • https://x.com/Shadowserver/status/1821121075704647731
VulnCheck XDB Entries:
  • https://vulncheck.com/xdb/3ffa6851bf72 - https://github.com/sinsinology/CVE-2024-4885

item.title: [vulncheck] CVE-2022-22897 - apollotheme ap_pagebuilder Improper Neutralization of Special Elements used in an SQL Command ('SQL Injection')
item.description:
A SQL injection vulnerability in the product_all_one_img and image_product parameters of the ApolloTheme AP PageBuilder component through 2.4.4 for PrestaShop allows unauthenticated attackers to exfiltrate database data.

Vendor: apollotheme
Product: ap_pagebuilder

VulnCheck Reported Exploitation Citations:
  • https://dashboard.shadowserver.org/statistics/honeypot/vulnerability/map/?day=2024-08-06&host_type=src&vulnerability=cve-2022-22897
  • https://dashboard.shadowserver.org/statistics/honeypot/vulnerability/map/?day=2024-08-07&host_type=src&vulnerability=cve-2022-22897
  • https://dashboard.shadowserver.org/statistics/honeypot/vulnerability/map/?day=2024-08-08&host_type=src&vulnerability=cve-2022-22897

item.title: [vulncheck] CVE-2024-29895 - Cacti cmd_realtime.php Command Injection Vulnerability
item.description:
Cacti provides an operational monitoring and fault management framework. A command injection vulnerability on the 1.3.x DEV branch allows any unauthenticated user to execute arbitrary command on the server when `register_argc_argv` option of PHP is `On`. In `cmd_realtime.php` line 119, the `$poller_id` used as part of the command execution is sourced from `$_SERVER['argv']`, which can be controlled by URL when `register_argc_argv` option of PHP is `On`. And this option is `On` by default in many environments such as the main PHP Docker image for PHP. Commit 53e8014d1f082034e0646edc6286cde3800c683d contains a patch for the issue, but this commit was reverted in commit 99633903cad0de5ace636249de16f77e57a3c8fc.

Vendor: Cacti Group
Product: Cacti

VulnCheck Reported Exploitation Citations:
  • https://dashboard.shadowserver.org/statistics/honeypot/vulnerability/map/?day=2024-08-06&host_type=src&vulnerability=cve-2024-29895
  • https://dashboard.shadowserver.org/statistics/honeypot/vulnerability/map/?day=2024-08-07&host_type=src&vulnerability=cve-2024-29895
VulnCheck XDB Entries:
  • https://vulncheck.com/xdb/a79c3784eb97 - https://github.com/ticofookfook/CVE-2024-29895.py
  • https://vulncheck.com/xdb/1e99608ca415 - https://github.com/secunnix/CVE-2024-29895
  • https://vulncheck.com/xdb/3c19ae27dbda - https://github.com/Rubioo02/CVE-2024-29895
  • https://vulncheck.com/xdb/69c83d977dcb - https://github.com/Stuub/CVE-2024-29895-CactiRCE-PoC

item.title: [vulncheck] CVE-2023-5148 - D-Link dar-7000_firmware Unrestricted Upload of File with Dangerous Type
item.description:
** UNSUPPORTED WHEN ASSIGNED ** A vulnerability was found in D-Link DAR-7000 and DAR-8000 up to 20151231. It has been declared as critical. This vulnerability affects unknown code of the file /Tool/uploadfile.php. The manipulation of the argument file_upload leads to unrestricted upload. The attack can be initiated remotely. The exploit has been disclosed to the public and may be used. The identifier of this vulnerability is VDB-240244. NOTE: This vulnerability only affects products that are no longer supported by the maintainer. NOTE: Vendor was contacted early and confirmed immediately that the product is end-of-life. It should be retired and replaced.

Vendor: D-Link
Product: dar-7000_firmware

VulnCheck Reported Exploitation Citations:
  • https://dashboard.shadowserver.org/statistics/honeypot/vulnerability/map/?day=2024-08-06&host_type=src&vulnerability=cve-2023-5148
  • https://dashboard.shadowserver.org/statistics/honeypot/vulnerability/map/?day=2024-08-07&host_type=src&vulnerability=cve-2023-5148

item.title: [vulncheck] CVE-2024-36971 - Android Kernel Remote Code Execution Vulnerability
item.description:
Android contains an unspecified vulnerability in the kernel that allows for remote code execution. This vulnerability resides in Linux Kernel and could impact other products, including but not limited to Android OS.

Date Added to CISA KEV: 2024-08-07T00:00:00Z
Vendor: Android
Product: Android

VulnCheck Reported Exploitation Citations:
  • https://www.cisa.gov/sites/default/files/feeds/known_exploited_vulnerabilities.json
  • https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1lkNJ0uQwbeC1ZTRrxdtuPLCIl7mlUreoKfSIgajnSyY/edit
  • https://source.android.com/docs/security/bulletin/2024-08-01
  • https://www.cybersecurity-help.cz/vdb/SB20240805114
  • https://www.zero-day.cz/database/897/

item.title: [vulncheck] CVE-2018-0824 - Microsoft COM for Windows Deserialization of Untrusted Data Vulnerability
item.description:
Microsoft COM for Windows contains a deserialization of untrusted data vulnerability that allows for privilege escalation and remote code execution via a specially crafted file or script.

Date Added to CISA KEV: 2024-08-05T00:00:00Z
Vendor: Microsoft
Product: Windows

VulnCheck Reported Exploitation Citations:
  • https://www.cisa.gov/sites/default/files/feeds/known_exploited_vulnerabilities.json
  • https://blog.talosintelligence.com/chinese-hacking-group-apt41-compromised-taiwanese-government-affiliated-research-institute-with-shadowpad-and-cobaltstrike-2/
VulnCheck XDB Entries:
  • https://vulncheck.com/xdb/a5ebdd77a6af - https://github.com/codewhitesec/UnmarshalPwn

item.title: [vulncheck] CVE-2024-37085 - VMware ESXi Authentication Bypass Vulnerability
item.description:
VMware ESXi contains an authentication bypass vulnerability. A malicious actor with sufficient Active Directory (AD) permissions can gain full access to an ESXi host that was previously configured to use AD for user management by re-creating the configured AD group ('ESXi Admins' by default) after it was deleted from AD.

Date Added to CISA KEV: 2024-07-30T00:00:00Z
Vendor: VMware
Product: ESXi

VulnCheck Reported Exploitation Citations:
  • https://www.cisa.gov/sites/default/files/feeds/known_exploited_vulnerabilities.json
  • https://www.microsoft.com/en-us/security/blog/2024/07/29/ransomware-operators-exploit-esxi-hypervisor-vulnerability-for-mass-encryption/
  • https://attackerkb.com/topics/2llWJbMF0o/cve-2024-37085

item.title: [vulncheck] CVE-2022-24663 - php_everywhere_project php_everywhere Improper Control of Generation of Code ('Code Injection')
item.description:
PHP Everywhere <= 2.0.3 included functionality that allowed execution of PHP Code Snippets via WordPress shortcodes, which can be used by any authenticated user.

Vendor: php_everywhere_project
Product: php_everywhere

VulnCheck Reported Exploitation Citations:
  • https://www.cisa.gov/sites/default/files/2024-07/aa24-207a-dprk-cyber-group-conducts-global-espionage-campaign.pdf
